project_context.type: Enterprise B2B SaaS / Industrial Web App
project_context.style_directive: Modern Minimalist, Industrial Professionalism, High-Contrast Swiss

theme_archetype.rationale: For an enterprise drilling report system, clarity and data density are paramount. We are moving away from messy liquid-glass to a crisp, 1px-border, grid-based 'Control Room' aesthetic.

headings.usage: Page titles, panel headers, KPI numbers. Gives a squarish, engineered, and professional industrial feel.

body_and_data.usage: Forms, tables, dense data entry, sidebars. Excellent legibility for numbers, dense grids, and multi-language support (EN/ES/ZH).

monospace.usage: Log tables, specific well IDs, raw data points.

spacing_and_layout.form_density: High density. Use CSS Grid for forms: grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 16px;
spacing_and_layout.panels: Remove all heavy drop-shadows. Use 1px solid border (#E5E7EB) with border-radius: 4px (very slight rounding, sharp industrial feel).

surfaces_and_components.liquid_glass_removal: Target all classes previously using 'liquid-glass' (backdrop-filter, rgba backgrounds). Replace their CSS definitions with flat #FFFFFF backgrounds, 1px solid borders, and no box-shadow. Do NOT remove the HTML classes.
surfaces_and_components.inputs_and_selects: Height: 36px. Border: 1px solid #D1D5DB. Background: #FFFFFF. Focus: border-color #0F52BA and box-shadow 0 0 0 2px rgba(15, 82, 186, 0.2). Remove arbitrary bolding.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary: #0F52BA bg, #FFFFFF text. Secondary: #FFFFFF bg, 1px solid #D1D5DB, #374151 text. Radius: 4px. Transition: background 0.2s ease.
surfaces_and_components.tables: border-collapse. Header row: bg #F9FAFB, text #4B5563, font-weight 600, 12px font size, uppercase tracking-wide. Data rows: 14px font, 1px bottom border #E5E7EB.
surfaces_and_components.sidebar: Switch from chaotic indigo to a strict Dark Slate sidebar (#101828) for high contrast. Text: #D1D5DB. Active item: background #1F2937, text #FFFFFF, left border 3px solid #0F52BA.
surfaces_and_components.toast_and_alerts: Flat design, solid background colors based on status palette. No transparency.

icons_and_media.strategy: Replace PNGs with modern scalable icons using Phosphor Icons.
icons_and_media.usage: Use . Maintain standard 20px size for sidebar, 16px for inline buttons.

legacy_integration_rules.critical_rule_1: DO NOT rename any existing classes, IDs, or data-* attributes in the HTML files. JS depends entirely on them.
legacy_integration_rules.critical_rule_2: DO NOT remove or modify app.js, admin.js, login.js, or liquid-glass.js.
legacy_integration_rules.critical_rule_3: Rewrite styles.css entirely by mapping the existing class names to the new modern minimalist styles defined here.

instructions_to_main_agent: Step 1: Add the Google Fonts import (Chivo & IBM Plex Sans) and Phosphor Icons CDN to the <head> of /app/web_form/index.html, login.html, and admin.html.
Step 2: Swap out PNG icons in HTML files for (Phosphor Icons) ONLY IF they don't have JS bindings on the exact element.
Step 3: Open /app/web_form/styles.css and clear out the old 4370 lines. Build a new CSS architecture using :root variables based on the color_palette and typography sections above.
Step 4: Map the legacy 'liquid-glass' classes (and panel wrappers) in styles.css to the flat 'Control Room Grid' styling (solid #FFFFFF bg, 1px #E5E7EB border).
Step 5: Apply CSS Grid to the massive form sections to organize inputs neatly (grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr))).
Step 6: Update input, select, textarea, and button classes to be flat, compact (36px height), and use the new focus rings.
Step 7: Update the sidebar CSS to use the #101828 Dark Slate background and precise active states, removing all gradient/transparency nonsense.
Step 8: Add data-testid attributes to key interactive elements (buttons, inputs) in HTML files.
